project_type: AWS CDK C# (.NET 8) serverless infrastructure project - Sleep Audio Pipeline
build_system: dotnet CLI with NuGet packages, CDK CLI via npx
test_framework: xUnit with CDK Assertions (C#), Python unittest with mocking
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-csharp-kiro && unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-csharp-kiro && unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity quiet
verification_instructions: 1. dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln 2. dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln 3. dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity quiet (129 tests pass) 4. npx cdk synth (optional, verifies synth works)
setup_instructions: unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln && dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - package registries available. Must unset NODE_OPTIONS before dotnet/cdk commands. .NET 9.0.314 installed (project targets net8.0 with RollForward). Node.js available for CDK CLI.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD methodology. All changes must be traceable to ARCHITECTURE.md. Conventional commits required. CI workflow: restore, build, test, cdk synth for multiple environments.
key_patterns: Documentation lives in docs/ directory (ARCHITECTURE.md, AGENT_GUIDELINES.md, SUMMARY.md). README.md at project root. License is Apache 2.0. Project uses Mermaid diagrams in docs. GitHub Actions CI in .github/workflows/ci.yml.
directory_structure: Root: README.md, LICENSE, cdk.json. src/CdkBase/ = CDK app (stacks, lambda). src/CdkBase.Tests/ = xUnit tests. docs/ = ARCHITECTURE.md, AGENT_GUIDELINES.md, SUMMARY.md. .github/workflows/ = ci.yml. .agents/tasks/ = prior task state.
